name: BROWN AND BROWN WHOLESALE
description_short: Brown and Brown Wholesale is a Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) used vehicle dealership in Mesa, AZ that finances vehicle purchases directly to customers with flexible credit requirements.
description_long:
Brown and Brown Wholesale is a family-owned and operated used vehicle dealership located in Mesa, Arizona, serving the greater Phoenix and Chandler areas. The company has over a decade of direct dealership experience with four generations of family business history. They operate as a Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) dealership, meaning they both sell vehicles and provide in-house financing directly to consumers. The dealership carries inventory across all major vehicle makes and models, ranging from economy cars to luxury brands, with model years from 1998 to 2025.

The company's primary service offering is financing used vehicle purchases for customers with various credit profiles. They advertise working with 'all types of credit' and offer financing terms ranging from 24 to 72 months. Their pricing structure is credit-score-based, with APRs ranging from 1.9% (excellent credit over 750) to 9.9% (very poor credit under 600). They also feature a $500 down payment option and a $150 referral reward program. Additional services include vehicle valuation tools, payment estimators, trade-in evaluations, and vehicle inventory browsing through their website.

What distinguishes Brown and Brown Wholesale is their BHPH model, which targets subprime and near-prime borrowers who may struggle to obtain financing through traditional lenders. Their emphasis on customer service, transparent pricing based on credit tiers, and family ownership positions them as a relationship-focused dealership. They provide a 'hassle-free' buying experience according to testimonials, with staff described as knowledgeable and helpful in explaining the process.

The honest assessment is that while Brown and Brown Wholesale serves a genuine market need for credit-challenged consumers seeking vehicle financing, BHPH dealerships typically carry higher costs than traditional auto loans due to elevated default risk and operational overhead. Customers should understand that APRs ranging up to 9.9% reflect the higher risk profile these lenders accept. The company's legitimacy appears solid based on their established history and customer testimonials, but consumers should carefully review all financing terms before purchase.
address: 750 S Country Club Dr, Mesa, AZ 85210

company_info.headquarters: 750 S Country Club Dr, Mesa, AZ 85210

pros: Works with all credit types including poor and very poor credit (under 600 score)
Low down payment option at $500 with approval (OAC)
Wide inventory across all major makes, models, and years (1998-2025)
Flexible loan terms from 24 to 72 months for payment customization
Transparent APR pricing structure clearly tied to credit score ranges
Online payment estimator tool for comparing scenarios before commitment
Established 4-generation family business with over a decade of dealership experience
$150 referral rewards program for customer acquisition
cons: APRs up to 9.9% for poor credit are significantly higher than traditional auto lenders (typically 4-8%)
BHPH model typically includes stricter payment enforcement and vehicle GPS/starter interrupt devices compared to conventional financing
Limited transparency on website regarding specific loan terms, prepayment penalties, or default consequences
No online application or financing approval process visible; requires in-person or phone contact for approval
Higher overall cost of borrowing means vehicle buyers will pay substantially more interest over the loan term
best_for: Subprime borrowers with credit scores below 650 who cannot qualify for traditional auto loans
Consumers needing immediate vehicle access with minimal down payment (as low as $500)
Buyers seeking flexible loan terms up to 72 months to minimize monthly payment obligations
Those who value local, family-owned dealerships with transparent credit-based pricing structures
diagnosis: Brown and Brown Wholesale is best for subprime and near-prime credit borrowers who cannot qualify for traditional auto financing and need flexible payment terms with minimal down payment. The main caveat is that BHPH financing carries APRs up to 9.9% and typically includes more restrictive loan terms than conventional auto loans, resulting in significantly higher total borrowing costs over the loan period.
services: Buy Here Pay Here vehicle financing with credit-based APR tiers
Used vehicle sales across all major makes and models
Monthly payment estimation tool with credit score and term customization
Low down payment financing options ($500 minimum advertised)
Online vehicle inventory browsing and comparison tools
Customer referral reward program ($150 per successful referral)
Vehicle selection across economy, mid-range, and luxury brands
